item.title: The AI Capex Money Map v0.2 — America Spends. Who Actually Keeps the Margin?
item.description: The AI Capex Money Map v0.2 — America Spends. Who Actually Keeps the Margin?From $650B to HBM, CoWoS and power — mapping who gets paid, who keeps margin, and when the bottlenecks move.Most people are
